Still questions?

+

Is the app safe?

Yes, when you trade on our app your funds are insured with a regulated and licensed broker.
+

Is Bitcoin Risky?

Every investor knows that there is some risk with every investment. But there is enough data to prove that bitcoin and cryptocurrency are going nowhere. So, choosing not to invest in crypto is a far riskier decision when you look at the math.
+

Why are we offering this for free?

It's simple math. The more we champion Bitcoin and give people the tools they need to invest successfully, the bigger the cryptocurrency will become. Which means the more money we all make.
+

I have never earned a euro online. Is this too advanced for me?

The system breaks everything down for you, so you don't need past experience. In fact, the less you know might even be an advantage...because you're not biased.
+

Am I really going to be making money in 24 hours?

If you follow our instructions, it will be practically impossible not to make money.
+

How much work does this mean for me?

Commit to setting aside 15 minutes a day to make this work. You can work from anywhere with an internet connection. Simply log into your personal dashboard from your laptop, phone or tablet.
+

How do I get started?

Fill out the form on this page, click the button and follow the simple instructions to get your first paycheck online.

What are others saying about our app?

Important Risk Warning: Trading FX and CFDs involves a high risk of loss due to the leverage effect of trading which could result in the total loss of your capital and may not be suitable for all types of investors. Please read our full risk warning and the relevant broker you are registered with to ensure you understand the risks before proceeding, taking into account your relevant experience. If necessary, seek independent advice. The information contained on this website and in the disclosure documents is general in nature and does not take into account your personal circumstances, financial situation or needs. You should review the brokerage agreement carefully and seek independent advice before deciding whether trading in such products is suitable for you.
